social_outreach.title: Brand Collab DM
social_outreach.description: A short, direct DM to a brand proposing a collaboration. Best sent via Instagram or TikTok DM.
social_outreach.body:
Hey {{brand_name}} team 👋

I'm {{your_name}}, a {{niche}} creator with {{follower_count}} followers on {{platform}}. My audience is {{audience_description}} — exactly the people who love what you make.

I'd love to collaborate on a {{collab_type}} (gifted post, paid partnership, or affiliate deal — whatever works best for you). I've worked with brands like {{past_brand_or_similar}} and consistently hit {{avg_engagement_rate}}% engagement.

Would you be open to chatting? Happy to send my media kit.

— {{your_name}}

social_outreach.title: PR / Feature Pitch Email
social_outreach.description: A professional email pitching yourself to a publication, blog, or newsletter for a feature story.

social_outreach.title: Creator Collab Proposal
social_outreach.description: A DM or email proposing a content collaboration with another creator in a complementary niche.
social_outreach.body:
Hey {{creator_name}}! 👋

Love what you're doing with {{their_content_type}} — your {{specific_post_or_series}} really resonated with me.

I'm {{your_name}}, a {{your_niche}} creator ({{your_follower_count}} followers). I think our audiences would genuinely enjoy a collab — your {{their_audience_trait}} + my {{your_audience_trait}} is a natural fit.

I was thinking we could do:
→ {{collab_idea_1}} (e.g. a joint reel, a takeover, a co-created post)
→ {{collab_idea_2}} (backup idea)

No pressure at all — just wanted to put it out there. Would you be open to a quick chat?

— {{your_name}}

social_outreach.title: Link in Bio Caption
social_outreach.description: A caption that drives followers to your link in bio. Works for any announcement, launch, or evergreen content.

social_outreach.title: Audience Engagement Post
social_outreach.description: A post designed to maximize comments and shares. Use polls, 'this or that', or AMA formats.

social_outreach.title: Podcast Guest Pitch Email
social_outreach.description: Pitch yourself as a guest to a podcast in your niche or the creator economy space.
social_outreach.body:
Subject: Guest Pitch — {{your_name}}, {{niche}} Creator & Entrepreneur

Hi {{host_name}},

I've been listening to {{podcast_name}} for a while — {{specific_episode_or_topic}} really resonated with me.

I'm {{your_name}}, a {{niche}} content creator turned entrepreneur. I've grown my audience to {{follower_count}} across Instagram and TikTok, and I've been building {{brand_name}} — {{one_sentence_brand_description}}.

I think your audience would find value in hearing about:
• {{story_angle_1}} (e.g. How I landed my first brand deal with under 5k followers)
• {{story_angle_2}} (e.g. Turning content creation into a real business at age {{your_age}})
• {{story_angle_3}} (e.g. What most young creators get wrong about monetisation)

I'm based in {{location}}, comfortable on video or audio, and can work around your schedule. Happy to send clips or a one-pager if that helps.

Would love to be on the show.

{{your_name}}
{{your_email}} | {{your_instagram_or_website}}

social_outreach.title: Brand Follow-Up DM
social_outreach.description: A short, friendly follow-up to send 7–10 days after your initial brand collab DM with no response. 80% of deals happen after a follow-up.
social_outreach.body:
Hey {{brand_name}} 👋 Just wanted to follow up on my message from last week!

I know inboxes get busy — totally understand. I'm still really interested in collaborating and think it could be a great fit for your audience.

Happy to share my media kit or chat on whatever terms work for you. No pressure either way!

— {{your_name}}

social_outreach.title: LinkedIn Outreach DM
social_outreach.description: A professional LinkedIn DM to connect with brand marketing managers, talent agents, investors, or journalists.
social_outreach.body:
Hi {{their_name}},

I came across your profile through {{how_you_found_them — e.g. 'your work at {{company}}' or 'a post you shared about {{topic}}'}} and wanted to connect.

I'm {{your_name}} — I build content and community around {{your_niche}}. I've grown to {{follower_count}} followers across Instagram and TikTok, and I'm currently focused on {{current_goal — e.g. 'scaling my brand partnerships' or 'raising a pre-seed round for my creator business'}}.

I think there could be a genuine overlap with what you're working on at {{their_company}}. Would love to connect and swap notes when you have a moment.

— {{your_name}}

social_outreach.title: TikTok Creator Collab DM
social_outreach.description: A short DM to propose a TikTok duet, stitch, or co-created video with another creator in your niche.

social_outreach.title: Rate Card Introduction Email
social_outreach.description: A professional email to send alongside your rate card when a brand asks 'what are your rates?'

social_outreach.title: Affiliate / Ambassador Application
social_outreach.description: An email to apply to an affiliate or ambassador program when no formal application exists — pitch yourself directly.
